problem: CHANGED_FILES behavior had no dedicated scenario-level assertions in gha-agent tests, despite scoped filtering being a required functional path.
impact: Regression in scope filtering could pass full-suite checks while silently linting the wrong file set
Potential false positives/negatives for no-match and scoped-match branches in repos with many changed files
antipattern: Relying only on all-match fixtures for agents with scoped execution behavior
solution: Add scenario fixtures for CHANGED_FILES pointing to non-workflow paths (expect SKIP)
Add scenario fixtures for CHANGED_FILES with one workflow file (expect targeted actionlint invocation path behavior)
